subject: chore(pwa): close remaining gaps — HMR guard, typed versioned, docs, tests
body:
Addresses every deferred / out-of-scope item from the PWA hardening
session: HMR listener safety, regex coverage, type safety, test depth,
and documentation for both manual QA and end-users.

src/lib/pwa.ts:
- initPwaGlobalListeners now guards on window.__pwaGlobalListenersAttached,
  not a module-scoped _globalInit variable. Module-scope resets on Vite
  HMR and would re-attach visibilitychange + controllerchange listeners
  each hot reload, duplicating fires. Window-scope survives module
  re-evaluation — same shape as src/utils/debugLog.ts's listener guard.
- _resetPwaStateForTesting() exported so vitest can isolate module state
  between tests. Underscore-prefixed + "ForTesting" named to surface
  misuse in code search.

src/types/browser.d.ts:
- Declares Window.__pwaGlobalListenersAttached alongside the existing
  debugLog guard flag.

vite.config.ts:
- versioned() is now typed on a literal union (`IconPath`) derived from
  ICON_PATHS as const — a typo like versioned('typo.png') fails at
  compile time instead of silently shipping `?v=undefined`. Runtime
  throw added as belt-and-braces.
- Final-sweep ICON_LINK_RE widened to cover `mask-icon` (Safari pinned
  tabs) and `apple-touch-startup-image` (iOS splash). A future <link
  rel="mask-icon"> added without updating REPLACEMENTS now throws at
  build time instead of leaking un-versioned.

src/__tests__/iconCacheBust.test.ts:
- 6 new source-level tripwires: sha256 (not timestamp) hashing,
  REPLACEMENTS-literal-missing throw, un-versioned-sweep throw,
  regex covers every icon-bearing rel, versioned() runtime throw.

src/__tests__/pwaSingleton.test.ts:
- 14 new unit tests for the lib/pwa.ts singleton. Covers the 30s
  suppression window, hasUpdate / offlineReady transitions + auto-
  dismiss with vi.useFakeTimers, snapshot referential stability
  (critical for useSyncExternalStore), subscribe/unsubscribe +
  listener-isolation-on-throw, and checkForUpdate() 'no-sw' branch.
  Inline sessionStorage shim avoids pulling jsdom/happy-dom for a
  tiny test suite.

tsconfig.test.json:
- Added DOM + DOM.Iterable libs so transitive imports from src/lib/
  type-check under the test project. Added src/types/**/* to include
  so Window.__pwaGlobalListenersAttached augmentation resolves.

docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md:
- 8 new manual scenarios covering Chunk 9 + 10: visibility-based update
  detection, 30s suppression, Check for updates menu item, controller-
  change reload guard, manifest identity fields, offline icon render,
  hash stability across rebuilds, Install modal outdated-icon
  disclosure. Regression checklist extended with 10 new PWA items.

docs/USER_GUIDE.md:
- New "Installing Sancio as an App" section (platform notes for
  iOS / macOS / Android / Firefox + guidance on stale-icon issues).
- New "Checking for Updates" section explaining auto-detection vs
  manual Check for updates, with plain-language typed-result copy.

25 tests total. Build + lint + typecheck + tests all clean.

Tags: pwa, testing, documentation, infrastructure, hardening
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: minor
